heading: Donald M. Payne International Development Fellowship Program
label: 2736d–1 Donald M. Payne International Development Fellowship Program
notes: DefinitionFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There shall be in the Department a Donald M. Payne International Development Fellowship Program.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall continue to provide financial assistance, mentoring, and professional development opportunities to individuals pursuing careers in international development.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: c Administration
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall be administered by the Department, consistent with existing law and regulations.
